import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_recursion_bug():
    """Target lies in the upper half of a two‑element interval – should return the last index."""
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    expected_index = 4
    assert find_in_sorted(arr, target) == expected_index, (
        f"Expected index {expected_index} for target {target} in {arr}"
    )

attempts.test_code:
import pytest

from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_not_found_upper_half():
    """find_in_sorted should return -1 when target is greater than all elements."""
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 8  # value larger than any element in the array
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == -1, f"Expected -1 for target {target} not in list {arr}, got {result}"
